## What and why

<!-- Link the issue and explain the user/maintainer outcome. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] relevant unit/integration/E2E tests
- [ ] `corepack pnpm build`

List commands actually run and results. Do not check tests you did not execute.

## Security and privacy

- Does this change process untrusted input, execute code, access network, use credentials, or send source externally?
- What controls and failure tests were added?

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] The change is substantive and focused.
- [ ] No secrets, fabricated metrics, or private data are included.
- [ ] No external issue, PR, email, or post was sent as part of this change.
